checkers.name: service_parity
covers: repo source vs installed runtime interpreter parity
selected deployment-state definitions for local AI service surfaces
installed runtime Python and shell wrapper interpreter drift
out_of_scope: Task Flow queue truth or closeout proof contradictions
runtime behavior beyond the named interpreter and wrapper surfaces

checkers.name: task_flow_truth_drift
covers: Workspaceboard managed-session presence for Task Flow-linked work
Task Flow row contradictions against board session state
out_of_scope: direct repair of live Task Flow rows
business correctness of inbox routing decisions
surfaces not named in the registry commands and rules

checkers.name: recursive_registry_lint
covers: structural validity of recursive checker registries
out_of_scope: live board, Task Flow, runtime, or deployment readback
